inputs.label: Deck Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of cards in the deck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of cards in the deck.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de cartes dans le jeu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de cartas en el mazo.

inputs.label: Successes in Deck
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards in the deck that are considered favorable outcomes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cards in the deck that are considered favorable outcomes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Destede olumlu sonuç olarak kabul edilen kart sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Karten im Kartensatz, die als günstige Ergebnisse gelten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes dans le jeu considérées comme des résultats favorables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas en el mazo que se consideran resultados favorables.

inputs.label: Number of Draws
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards drawn from the deck without replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cards drawn from the deck without replacement.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aus dem Kartensatz ohne Zurücklegen gezogenen Karten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes tirées du jeu sans remise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas extraídas del mazo sin reemplazo.

inputs.label: Wanted Successes
inputs.businessContext: Number of successful cards you want to appear in the draw.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of successful cards you want to appear in the draw.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çekilişte görünmesini istediğiniz başarılı kart sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Erfolgskarten, die in der Ziehung erscheinen sollen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cartes gagnantes que vous souhaitez voir apparaître dans le tirage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cartas exitosas que desea que aparezcan en la extracción.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
